check: Open the original source page, not a mirror or repost.
why_it_matters: Mirrors can strip license context or point to stale files.

check: Record the source URL and visible license signal in the provenance log.
why_it_matters: You need evidence later if the source page changes.

check: Separate CC0/no-attribution items from attribution-required items.
why_it_matters: Game jam credits are often forgotten under time pressure.

check: For fonts, check embedding, modification, logo/brand use, and redistribution separately.
why_it_matters: Font rights can differ from ordinary sprite/audio asset rights.

check: Re-open each source page and confirm the license signal still exists.
why_it_matters: Creator pages and platform terms can change.

check: Keep original asset packs out of your public repo/build unless redistribution is clearly allowed.
why_it_matters: Using an asset in a game and redistributing the raw asset pack are different actions.

check: Export a credits/provenance note even when attribution is not required.
why_it_matters: It reduces future audit work and takedown panic.
